_description: Computer programs from Alternity PHB Chapter 14. Quality tiers: M/O/G/A. Slots = active memory slots required.

programs.name: Application
programs.description: General-purpose application (word processor, spreadsheet, database).

programs.name: Datadoc
programs.description: Creates, edits, and formats documents. Includes spellcheck and grammar tools.

programs.name: Datascan
programs.description: Searches databases and Grid sites for specific information. -1 bonus to Knowledge-computer operation checks.

programs.name: Decode
programs.description: Decrypts encoded files and transmissions. Complex skill check vs encoding strength.

programs.name: Encode
programs.description: Encrypts files and transmissions. Quality determines encoding strength.

programs.name: Enhance
programs.description: Activates reflex wiring for enhanced speed. Causes stun damage per round of use. Requires Reflex cyberware.

programs.name: Entertainment
programs.description: Games, simulations, holovids. Can be used to distract or entertain NPCs.

programs.name: Gridwipe
programs.description: Erases all traces of the user's Grid presence. Complex skill check.

programs.name: Reference
programs.description: Searchable reference database. -1 bonus to Knowledge checks in the reference's subject area.

programs.name: Surge
programs.description: Electrical attack program. Damages hardware or shadows. Damage scales with quality.

programs.name: Trace
programs.description: Traces the origin of a Grid connection. Complex skill check vs target's Gridwipe or Encode.

programs.name: Break-in
programs.description: Bypasses security on closed/restricted systems. Each success penetrates one defense layer.

programs.name: Corrupt
programs.description: Corrupts data on target system. Can destroy files or alter records.

programs.name: Crash
programs.description: Crashes target system or program. System must reboot, losing all active processes.

programs.name: Shadow Armor
programs.description: Virtual armor for grid combat. Protection and attack penalty scale with quality.

programs.name: Shadow Armor 2
programs.description: Enhanced virtual armor. Better protection and penalties than Shadow Armor.

programs.name: Shadow Weapon
programs.description: Virtual weapon for grid combat. Damage and attack bonus scale with quality.

programs.name: Shadow Weapon 2
programs.description: Enhanced virtual weapon. Better damage than Shadow Weapon.

programs.name: Alarm
programs.description: Alerts system administrator to intrusion attempts. Adds penalty to hacker's Break-in checks.

programs.name: Antivirus
programs.description: Detects and destroys virus programs. Quality determines detection skill score.

programs.name: Assist
programs.description: AI assistant that helps with skill checks. Provides -1 bonus to one specified skill.

programs.name: Control
programs.description: Controls connected devices (doors, cameras, weapons, vehicles). Slots depend on complexity.

programs.name: Fortress
programs.description: Adds additional defense layers to a system. Each quality tier adds more layers.

programs.name: Grid Log
programs.description: Records all Grid activity for later review. Invisible to other users.

programs.name: Gridlock
programs.description: Prevents target from leaving the current Grid location. Complex skill check to maintain.

programs.name: Guardian
programs.description: Defensive AI entity that patrols and protects a system. Has own stats and can fight shadows.

programs.name: Menace
programs.description: Offensive AI entity deployed to hunt and destroy intruding shadows.

programs.name: Mirror Image
programs.description: Creates decoy shadows to confuse opponents. Attackers must determine which is real.

programs.name: Shadow Form
programs.description: Creates the gridpilot's virtual body for Grid operations. STR/DEX/CON based on quality.

programs.name: Shadow Form 2
programs.description: Enhanced virtual body with all 6 ability scores. Built-in 2 ranks hacking.

programs.name: Static
programs.description: Creates interference that penalizes all Grid operations in the area.

programs.name: Transfer
programs.description: Transfers files between systems. Can be used to upload/download data.

programs.name: Virus
programs.description: Self-replicating program that carries a payload. Quality determines skill score.

computers.name: Data Slate
computers.description: Handheld tablet. Limited memory. Read-only access.

computers.name: Gridcaster Gauntlet
computers.description: Wrist-mounted gridcaster for mobile Grid access.

computers.name: Gridsuit
computers.description: Full-body sensory suit for Grid immersion. No processor — uses external computer.

computers.name: Mainframe
computers.description: Large stationary system. High memory capacity.

computers.name: Supercomputer
computers.description: Massive processing power. Unlimited active memory.
